title: Lab Technician
description:
Job Summary

Assist in preparing and managing laboratory samples and equipment to support process and product testing. You will operate lab equipment, maintain accurate records, manage inventory, and ensure a clean and safe laboratory environment.

Responsibilities

  • Prepare lab samples by pre-weighing raw materials and recording data accurately
  • Conduct sample preparation, record data, and generate reports for analysis
  • Requisition and manage raw materials to support laboratory processes
  • Manage process change documentation and registration for basic and exploratory raw materials
  • Measure and record product sample data following experimental protocols
  • Schedule and set up laboratory equipment according to experimental instructions
  • Operate lab equipment and record results clearly and accurately
  • Perform equipment shutdown procedures after experiments are completed
  • Coordinate and facilitate safety checks, calibration, maintenance, and servicing of lab equipment
  • Maintain detailed equipment records, including daily and pre-use calibration checklists
  • Manage inventory of samples, consumables, chemicals, and reagents to ensure laboratory readiness
  • Support registration, procurement, and disposal of chemicals, confidential products, and materials
  • Perform routine housekeeping to maintain cleanliness and safety of laboratory and equipment
  • Handle shipment of products and raw materials as required

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience in Process Laboratory, Process Manufacturing, or Biopharmaceutical Manufacturing
  • Diploma in Chemistry or related discipline
  • Customer orientation by working collaboratively with team members and responding to customer needs
  • Collaboration skills to contribute positively to team goals and support colleagues
  • Communication skills to share information clearly and respond to inquiries in English, both written and verbal
  • Decision-making skills by following established processes and guidelines
  • Problem-solving skills by identifying issues and applying procedures to resolve them
  • Basic computer literacy, including proficiency in Microsoft Office software
  • Ability to operate simple machinery safely and effectively
